name: tabs
description: Required prop defining the list of tabs.

name: value
description: Value of the currently active tab (controlled).

name: defaultValue
description: Value of the initially active tab (uncontrolled).

name: onChange
description: Callback invoked when the active tab changes.

name: intent
description: Controls the color intent of the tab indicator.

name: orientation
description: Controls the layout direction of the tab list.
